name: Censys
description: Monitor internet-facing assets and attack surface with Censys Search. Verify infrastructure inventory, host monitoring, and account health for compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Censys at https://search.censys.io
2. Go to Account > API (https://search.censys.io/account/api)
3. Copy your API ID and API Secret
4. Paste them below

checks.name: Censys Monitoring and Alerting
checks.description: Verifies the Censys account is active and has remaining query allowance for continuous monitoring.

checks.name: Censys App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that hosts are being monitored for the organization's domain via Censys Search.

checks.name: Censys Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Verifies that infrastructure assets are tracked and inventoried in Censys for the organization's domain.
